plugins.name: syneidesis
plugins.description: Surface potential gaps at decision points — /gap (συνείδησις: knowing-together)

plugins.name: hermeneia
plugins.description: Clarify intent-expression gaps through dialogue — /clarify (ἑρμηνεία: interpretation)

plugins.name: katalepsis
plugins.description: Achieve certain comprehension of AI work — /grasp (κατάληψις: a grasping firmly)

plugins.name: telos
plugins.description: Co-construct defined goals from vague intent — /goal (τέλος: end, purpose)

plugins.name: aitesis
plugins.description: Infer context insufficiency before execution — /inquire (αἴτησις: a requesting)

plugins.name: analogia
plugins.description: Validate structural mapping between domains — /ground (ἀναλογία: a proportion)

plugins.name: prosoche
plugins.description: Route upstream epistemic deficits and evaluate execution-time risks — /attend (προσοχή: attention)

plugins.name: epharmoge
plugins.description: Detect application-context mismatch after execution — /contextualize (ἐφαρμογή: an application)

plugins.name: horismos
plugins.description: Define epistemic boundaries per decision — /bound (ὁρισμός: a bounding)

plugins.name: epistemic-cooperative
plugins.description: /catalog for protocol handbook, /report for Growth Map (epistemic analysis + insights), /onboard for quest-based protocol learning, /dashboard for coverage dashboard, /compose for protocol composition authoring, /introspect for deep self-analysis pipeline (behavioral profile + HTML report), /sophia for philosopher match, /curses for strength-shadow analysis, /write for multi-perspective blog drafting, /artifact-review for markdown artifact review with browser inline-comment channel

plugins.name: anamnesis
plugins.description: Resolve vague recall into recognized context — /recollect (ἀνάμνησις: recollection)
